zh.lifeSummary: 當William Barsham於1558年6月27日出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Thomas Barsham33歲，母親Audrey Jennison27歲。他於1579年7月10日與Anne Yelverton在英國諾福爾可斯克爾索普結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國諾福爾可可爾吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Barsham于1558年6月27日出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Thomas Barsham33岁，母亲Audrey Jennison27岁。他于1579年7月10日与Anne Yelverton在英国諾福爾可斯克爾索普结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国諾福爾可可爾吉可。

nameMeanings.name: Barsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North, East, or West Barsham (Norfolk), or from Barsham (Suffolk).

variants.name: Basson
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Basso, based on the element bad (from badhuo) ‘battle’.
German: of French (Huguenot) origin (see 2 above). This surname is very rare in Germany. Compare   Posson  .

variants.name: Basham
meanings: English (Norfolk, Suffolk, and Essex): variant of Barsham, a habitational name from any of the places in Norfolk and Suffolk called Barsham, from the genitive case of the Old English byname Bār ‘wild boar’ + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When William Barsham was born on 27 June 1558, in Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas Barsham, was 33 and his mother, Audrey Jennison, was 27. He married Anne Yelverton on 10 July 1579, in Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He was buried in Colkirk, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Barsham est né le 27 juin 1558, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Barsham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Audrey Jennison, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Anne Yelverton le 10 juillet 1579, à Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Ilenterré à Colkirk, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Barsham am 27. Juni 1558 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Barsham 33 und seine Mutter Audrey Jennison 27. Er hat am 10. Juli 1579 in Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England Anne Yelverton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er wurde in Colkirk, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Barsham è nato il il 27 giugno 1558 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Barsham, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Audrey Jennison, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Anne Yelverton il 10 luglio 1579, nel Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolto a Colkirk, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Barshamが1558年6月27日にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Thomas Barshamは33歳，母Audrey Jennisonは27歳であった。1579年7月10日にイギリスノーフォルクスクウルソルペでAnne Yelvertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスノーフォルクコルキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Barsham(이)가 1558년 6월 27일 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Barsham(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Audrey Jennison(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1579년 7월 10일 영국 노르폴크 스컬소에서 Anne Yelverton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 노르폴크 코커크에 묻혔다.

pt.27 June 1558–4 January 1595: 27 de junho de 1558–4 de janeiro de 1595
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Barsham nasceu em 27 de junho de 1558, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Barsham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Audrey Jennison, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Yelverton em 10 de julho de 1579, em Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Barsham родился 27 июня 1558 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Barsham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Audrey Jennison, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Yelverton 10 июля 1579 г. в местности скултаурп, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности колкирк, норфолк, Англия.

es.27 June 1558–4 January 1595: 27 de junio de 1558–4 de enero de 1595
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Barsham nació el 27 de junio de 1558, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Barsham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Audrey Jennison, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Anne Yelverton el 10 de julio de 1579, en Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Fue sepultado en Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
